choice: All tracked accounts are at E*TRADE and API-visible. Two model buckets: 'tax-deferred' (rollover IRAs, the Excel's 401k column, taxed on withdrawal) and 'post-tax' (taxable brokerage). Each E*TRADE account maps to exactly one bucket.
rationale: User confirmed 401k money is mostly rolled into rollover IRAs at E*TRADE, so the whole portfolio syncs via one API
